distance_km.note: No reliable sources mention 'Raubichi Ski Marathon' or confirm 50km distance; related Minsk Ski Track events at Raubichi describe relays (e.g., 4x2km=8km) and a 2.5km trail, but no marathon distance found.[1][2][6][9]

elevation_m.note: No sources provide total elevation gain for any cross-country ski race at Raubichi, including claimed marathon.[1][3][6][9]

country.note: Raubichi is confirmed as a sports center in Belarus.[1][3][5][6]

region_state_province.note: Events described as 'Minsk Ski Race/Track' held in Raubichi, indicating Minsk region.[1][4][5][7]

discipline.note: No sources specify classic, skate, or both for a 'Raubichi Ski Marathon'; Raubichi hosts biathlon and ski events, but discipline not detailed for marathon.[1][2][3][5]

field_size.note: No participant numbers found for 'Raubichi Ski Marathon'; Minsk Ski Track called mass event but no specifics like 500.[1][4][5][7]

founded.note: No sources mention founding year of 1995 for 'Raubichi Ski Marathon'; Raubichi center built for 1974 Biathlon Worlds, but no marathon history.[3][8]

official_website_url.note: Raubichi site is rau.by or raubichi.com variant, but no mention of 'Ski Marathon' event; https://www.raubichi.com not confirmed in results and no event details there implied.[6]

race_date_month.note: Related Minsk Ski Track at Raubichi held in early March (e.g., March 7, 2026; March 1, 2025), not February.[1][4][5][7]
